page: Microsoft Azure DS4 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DS server family, powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture using an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz. The CPU configuration includes a 35 MB L3 cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 32 KB L1d cache, supporting instruction sets such as AVX, AVX-512, AES, and FMA. The system is equipped with 28.0 GB of system memory, providing 3.5 GB per core, and includes 57 GB of local storage. No GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included in this configuration.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is relatively weak, falling into the bottom 25% for stress-ng, Geekbench, and single-threaded compression tasks like gzip and bzip3. However, multi-core execution scales to average levels, with stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU scores all placing in the middle 50%. Memory bandwidth is also average, reaching 720.11 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 81.38 GB/sec for uncached large blocks.

Given its balanced resource allocation and average multi-threaded performance, the DS4 is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that do not demand high single-thread speed but benefit from parallel processing. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, static web serving, Redis database operations, software compilation, and lightweight LLM inference using small models.
description: Microsoft Azure DS4 is an x86_64 general-purpose virtual machine powered by an 8-core Intel Xeon 8272CL processor clocked at 2.6 GHz. It features 28.0 GB of RAM, 57 GB of local storage, and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor with dedicated CPU allocation. While single-core benchmark results for this instance are weak, its multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall consistently in the average tier. This resource profile makes the DS4 a balanced option for multi-threaded workloads, including static web serving, Redis operations, software compilation, and lightweight machine learning inference using small models, offering a stable utility-to-resource ratio without the overhead of specialized hardware.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DS4 is an 8-core Intel Xeon 8272CL virtual machine with 28 GB RAM and 57 GB local storage, delivering average multi-core and database performance for general-purpose workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DS4 is an 8-core Intel Xeon virtual machine with 28 GB RAM, offering balanced multi-core performance for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A balanced eight-core virtual machine with dedicated Intel Xeon processing and local storage for multi-threaded general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL physical cores running at 2.6 GHz
28.0 GB of system memory and 57 GB of local storage
Average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
Suitable for static web serving, Redis operations, and software compilation
Supports AVX-512 and AES hardware acceleration flags
